name: The Supreme Cannabis Company, Inc.
description: The Supreme Cannabis Company, Inc. is a Canada-based company focused on producing premium cannabis products. The company operates a diverse portfolio of brands, including its flagship brand 7ACRES, Blissco, Truverra, and KKE. Through its advanced cultivation and processing facilities, Supreme Cannabis provides high-quality recreational and medical cannabis products to consumers and patients across Canada and international markets. In 2021, the company was acquired by Canopy Growth Corporation.
